use_cases: Create animated circular text for branding logos or product labels
Add decorative spinning text elements to hero sections
Display rotating labels or tags on loading indicators
Generate orbit-style text for social media content or thumbnails
Add visual interest with animated text in creative portfolios
ai_summary: A lightweight spinning text component that renders text along a circular SVG path with continuous rotation animation. Supports customizable radius, speed, direction (normal/reverse), and text styling. Uses a unique generated path ID for multiple instances on the same page. Perfect for creating decorative circular text effects commonly seen in crypto branding, product labels, and creative hero sections.
